Hotels in Kolonaki, Athens

Upscale & Chic

4 Hotels
€200 Avg/Night
15-20 min to Acropolis

Quick answer

Kolonaki is best for Luxury travelers, Shoppers, Art lovers.

Kolonaki is a upscale & chic area with 4 tracked hotels averaging about €200/night. In this dataset, 1 hotel show an Acropolis-view signal and 2 hotels show a rooftop-bar signal. The lowest tracked nightly price signal is €120 at Kolonaki Townhouse.

Compare hotels Booking notes FAQs

About Kolonaki

Athens' most fashionable neighborhood with designer boutiques, art galleries, and sophisticated cafes. At the foot of Lycabettus Hill.

UpscaleFashionableQuiet
Best for: Luxury travelers, Shoppers, Art lovers

What to Know Before Booking in Kolonaki

Best-fit traveler

Kolonaki works especially well for luxury travelers, shoppers, art lovers. If that is not your trip style, compare nearby alternatives before booking.

Price signal

The tracked Kolonaki hotels average about €200 per night, with actual rates changing by date, room type, and cancellation policy.

Location signal

Kolonaki is listed as 15-20 min from the Acropolis in this dataset. Confirm the exact hotel address and transit route before booking.

FAQs: Staying in Kolonaki

Is Kolonaki a good area to stay in Athens?

Yes. Kolonaki is athens' most fashionable neighborhood with designer boutiques, art galleries, and sophisticated cafes. It is especially useful for luxury travelers, shoppers, art lovers.

How far is Kolonaki from the Acropolis?

Kolonaki is 15-20 min walk from the Acropolis. Kolonaki is listed as 15-20 min from the Acropolis in the Hotels of Athens neighborhood data. Exact walking time depends on the individual hotel address and entrance used.

What's the average hotel price in Kolonaki?

Hotels in Kolonaki average around €200 per night. Tracked hotels in Kolonaki average around €200 per night, with the visible dataset spanning 4 options. Confirm live rates before booking.
